englishDefinitions: A school subject that teaches practical life skills such as cooking, sewing, budgeting, and managing a household.
A field of study focused on domestic skills and family well-being.
persianTranslation: کارهای خانگی به عنوان درس مدرسه
examples: She learned basic sewing and cooking skills in home economics class.
Home economics used to be a mandatory subject in many schools.
Modern home economics classes now also cover financial literacy and nutrition.
